Step: Note the current fan speed level displayed on the Climate Control screen
Expected Result: The current fan speed level is visible (e.g. level indicator or bar graph)

Step: Tap the fan speed "Up" button to increase the fan speed by one level
Expected Result: The fan speed indicator increases by one level

Step: Verify the fan speed display updates to the new level
Expected Result: The fan speed indicator or bar reflects the higher speed

Step: Tap the fan speed "Up" button two more times to reach a higher fan speed
Expected Result: The fan speed increases by two additional levels

Step: Verify the fan speed display reflects the cumulative increase
Expected Result: The fan speed indicator shows a level 3 steps higher than the original

Step: Tap the fan speed "Down" button repeatedly until the fan speed returns to the original level
Expected Result: The fan speed decreases step by step back to the original level

Step: Verify the fan speed has returned to its original level
Expected Result: The fan speed indicator matches the value noted in step 1

Step: Tap the "Auto" button to enable automatic climate control
Expected Result: The Auto mode indicator activates; fan speed may adjust automatically

Step: Verify the "Auto" indicator is active on screen
Expected Result: The Auto button or status shows that automatic mode is engaged
